name: VSM Financial Converter
description: Converts Value Stream Mapping operational metrics into financial impact, highlighting hidden losses and improvement opportunities based on Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO standards.

inputs.label: Annual Demand (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total customer demand per year for the product family under analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total customer demand per year for the product family under analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz edilen ürün ailesi için yıllık toplam müşteri talebi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Kundennachfrage pro Jahr für die analysierte Produktfamilie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demande totale du client par an pour la famille de produits analysée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Demanda total del cliente por año para la familia de productos bajo análisis.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي طلب العملاء السنوي لعائلة المنتج قيد التحليل.

inputs.label: Selling Price per unit
inputs.businessContext: Average selling price per unit to the customer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average selling price per unit to the customer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteriye birim başına ortalama satış fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Verkaufspreis pro Einheit an den Kunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente moyen unitaire au client.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta promedio por unidad al cliente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط سعر البيع لكل وحدة للعميل.

businessContext_i18n.es: Costo directo de material por unidad.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully loaded labor cost per operator hour.

label_i18n.es: Costo de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully loaded labor cost per operator hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatör saati başına tam yüklü işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de main-d'œuvre entièrement chargé par heure opérateur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de mano de obra totalmente cargado por hora de operador.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة العمالة الكاملة لكل ساعة مشغل.

inputs.label: Total Cycle Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all process cycle times for one unit through the value stream.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all process cycle times for one unit through the value stream.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değer akışı boyunca bir birim için tüm proses çevrim sürelerinin toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller Prozesszykluszeiten für eine Einheit durch den Wertstrom.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de tous les temps de cycle de processus pour une unité à travers la chaîne de valeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los tiempos de ciclo del proceso para una unidad a través del flujo de valor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مجموع أوقات دورة العمليات لوحدة واحدة عبر تيار القيمة.

inputs.label: Total Value-Added Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of only value-added process times (ISO 22400, Lean definition).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of only value-added process times (ISO 22400, Lean definition).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yalnızca katma değerli proses sürelerinin toplamı (ISO 22400, Yalın tanımı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe nur der wertschöpfenden Prozesszeiten (ISO 22400, Lean-Definition).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des temps de processus à valeur ajoutée uniquement (définition ISO 22400, Lean).
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de solo los tiempos de proceso de valor agregado (ISO 22400, definición Lean).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مجموع أوقات العمليات ذات القيمة المضافة فقط (ISO 22400، تعريف اللين).

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units that require rework or are scrapped (First Pass Yield).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units that require rework or are scrapped (First Pass Yield).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden işlem veya fire olan birimlerin yüzdesi (İlk Geçiş Verimi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Einheiten, die Nacharbeit oder Ausschuss erfordern (First Pass Yield).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités nécessitant une reprise ou mises au rebut (rendement de premier passage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades que requieren retrabajo o se convierten en desperdicio (Rendimiento de primer paso).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الوحدات التي تتطلب إعادة عمل أو يتم هدرها (العائد من المحاولة الأولى).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per defective unit
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost to rework one defective unit (labor + material).

label_i18n.tr: Hatalı Birim Başına Yeniden İşlem Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût de reprise par unité défectueuse
label_i18n.es: Costo de retrabajo por unidad defectuosa
label_i18n.ar: تكلفة إعادة العمل لكل وحدة معيبة

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost to rework one defective unit (labor + material).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir hatalı birimi yeniden işlemek için ek maliyet (işçilik + malzeme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kosten für die Nacharbeit einer fehlerhaften Einheit (Arbeit + Material).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût supplémentaire pour reprendre une unité défectueuse (main-d'œuvre + matière).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo adicional para retrabajar una unidad defectuosa (mano de obra + material).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الإضافية لإعادة عمل وحدة معيبة واحدة (عمالة + مواد).

rules.message: Value-added time cannot exceed total cycle time.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 100.
Average inventory value must be non-negative.
Waste reduction target must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 5% – significant quality loss.
Value-added ratio below 30% – high non-value-added waste.
Inventory value exceeds 1M currency – consider reduction initiatives.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
